notes: VIX easing to 15.7 with Nasdaq/Dow at records and chips rebounding (AMD firm on Goldman upgrade), tech jitters fading, but AMAT still -10% and cash is only $66, so I nudge risk to 0.6 while keeping the chip/memory laggards and low-conviction names parked in avoid.
journal_entry: Mon 7/6 15:12: neutral/0.6 (up from 0.5), VIX 15.7, day P&L +5. Tape constructive into the close, chips bouncing (AMD/Goldman), QQQ/SPY green; still avoiding AMAT/MU rotation drags and thin cash caps adds. Watching busy tech-earnings week and Jul 6-10 econ data.
